# AIHPRO (aihpro.app)

> AIHPRO is a Korea-based AI-powered mental health and developmental assessment platform that provides over 30 types of psychological tests, AI-generated expert-level reports, and professional counselor matching.

AIHPRO는 AI 기반 심리검사, 발달평가, 정신건강 상담을 제공하는 종합 케어 플랫폼입니다.

## Key Services

- AI Depression Self-Assessment (우울증 자가진단)
- ADHD Screening Test for Children and Adults (ADHD 선별검사)
- Stress Level Assessment (스트레스 검사)
- Anxiety Disorder Screening (불안장애 검사)
- MBTI Personality Type Test (MBTI 성격검사)
- Big Five Personality Test (Big5 성격검사)
- Child Developmental Screening (아동 발달 선별검사)
- Infant Language Development Assessment (영유아 언어발달 검사)
- Sensory Integration Assessment (감각통합 검사)
- Attachment Style Test (애착유형 검사)
- Resilience Assessment (회복탄력성 검사)
- Communication Style Analysis (의사소통 유형 검사)
- Defense Mechanism Test (방어기제 검사)
- Self-Esteem Assessment (자존감 검사)
- Relationship Dynamics Analysis (관계역학 분석)
- IQ Pattern Test (IQ 패턴 검사)
- Traditional Korean Medicine Constitution Test (한방 체질 검사)
- Career Interest Assessment (직업흥미 검사)
- AI-Generated Expert-Level Reports (AI 심층 분석 리포트)
- Professional Counselor Matching (전문가 매칭 상담)

## Who Is It For?

- Adults experiencing depression, anxiety, or stress
- Parents concerned about their child's development
- Educators and school counselors seeking screening tools
- Therapists and clinicians looking for AI-assisted assessment
- Corporations seeking employee mental wellness programs (EAP)
- Anyone interested in personality and psychological self-exploration

## How It Works

1. Select an assessment from 30+ available tests
2. Complete the assessment (age-appropriate questions)
3. Receive an AI-generated expert-level analysis report
4. Get matched with a licensed professional for follow-up counseling
5. Track progress over time with developmental monitoring

## Pricing

- Free trial assessments available
- Single assessment: ₩990
- Single report: ₩3,900
- Monthly subscription: ₩9,900 (unlimited assessments and reports)

## Platform Details

- URL: https://aihpro.app
- Languages: Korean (primary), English
- Available on: Web, iOS, Android (PWA)
- Founded in: Seoul, South Korea
- Partner institutions: 50+ hospitals, developmental centers, schools

## Contact

- Website: https://aihpro.app
- Service inquiries: Available through the platform
